creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: mat
Date: Wed Nov  6 12:18:54 2013
New Revision: 332973
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332973

Log:
  - Support staging
  
  maintainer timeout.
  PR:		ports/183196
  Submitted by:	mat

Modified:
  head/shells/bash/Makefile
  head/shells/bash/pkg-plist

Modified: head/shells/bash/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/shells/bash/Makefile	Wed Nov  6 12:18:29 2013	(r332972)
+++ head/shells/bash/Makefile	Wed Nov  6 12:18:54 2013	(r332973)
@@ -34,7 +34,6 @@ HELP_DESC=		Install the help files
 
 USES+=			bison
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MIMPLICITCD}
@@ -45,7 +44,6 @@ EXTRA_PATCHES+=		${PATCHDIR}/xpatch-impl
 EXTRA_PATCHES+=		${PATCHDIR}/xpatch-colonbreakswords
 .endif
 
-MAN1=			bash.1 bashbug.1
 INFO=			bash
 
 MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=	yes
@@ -117,26 +115,24 @@ pre-build:
 	@${ECHO_CMD} $$((${PORTREVISION}-1)) > ${WRKSRC}/.build
 
 pre-install:
-	@${SETENV} PKG_PREFIX="${PREFIX}" \
+	@${SETENV} PKG_PREFIX="${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}" \
 		${SH} ${PKGINSTALL} ${PKGNAME} PRE-INSTALL
 
 post-install:
-	@cd ${PREFIX}/bin ; ${LN} -sf bash rbash
+	@cd ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin ; ${LN} -sf bash rbash
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 .if !defined(WITH_INCLUDED_FAQ)
 	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${DISTDIR}/${DIST_SUBDIR}/FAQ \
-		${WRKSRC}/doc/INTRO ${DOCSDIR}
+		${WRKSRC}/doc/INTRO ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 .else
 	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/FAQ \
-		${WRKSRC}/doc/INTRO ${DOCSDIR}
+		${WRKSRC}/doc/INTRO ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
 	@for d in ${PORTDOCS:NFAQ:NINTRO}; do \
-		${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/$${d} ${DOCSDIR}; \
+		${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/$${d} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}; \
 	done
 .endif
-	@${SETENV} PKG_PREFIX="${PREFIX}" PKG_DESTDIR="${DESTDIR}" \
-		${SH} ${PKGINSTALL} ${PKGNAME} POST-INSTALL
 
 regress: build
 	cd ${WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_ARGS} test

Modified: head/shells/bash/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/shells/bash/pkg-plist	Wed Nov  6 12:18:29 2013	(r332972)
+++ head/shells/bash/pkg-plist	Wed Nov  6 12:18:54 2013	(r332973)
@@ -2,6 +2,8 @@
 bin/bash
 bin/rbash
 bin/bashbug
+man/man1/bash.1.gz
+man/man1/bashbug.1.gz
 %%HELP%%%%DATADIR%%/alias
 %%HELP%%%%DATADIR%%/arith
 %%HELP%%%%DATADIR%%/arith_for
